title: Application returns to home screen after attempting to add a new site.
description: When attempting to add a new site and inputting a controller serial number, the application navigates back to the device's home screen.
steps: Tap the menu icon (three horizontal lines) in the top-left corner.
Tap the '+ ADD NEW SITE' button.
Enter 'serial bug ||' into the 'Site Name' field.
Tap the back arrow in the top-left corner.
Tap the back arrow in the top-left corner again.
Tap the '+ ADD NEW SITE' button.
Enter '0631351046' into the 'Controller Serial Number' field.
Tap the 'YES' button in the 'Verify Controller is Ready' dialog.
Observe the application navigating to the device's home screen.
actual: After tapping 'YES' in the 'Verify Controller is Ready' dialog, the application closes and returns to the device's home screen.
expected: After tapping 'YES' in the 'Verify Controller is Ready' dialog, the application should proceed to the next step of adding the controller or site, and not navigate to the device's home screen.
